engineGuide.h2: Dodge Caliber Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Dodge Caliber across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Most common UK Caliber diesel; VW-derived EA188 architecture with piezo injectors and turbocharging.
compatibleVariants: SE, SXT, SX, Sport, R/T, Crossroad (FWD)
commonFailures: Piezo injector failure - hard starts, misfires from 70k miles
EGR valve clogging - limp mode trigger on short journeys
Turbo seal wear - oil leaks and boost loss after 120k miles
entries.cta: Get quotes for BWD Dodge Caliber engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Minor calibration variant of BWD; identical architecture with slight ECU mapping differences.
commonFailures: Injector wiring harness degradation - intermittent fault codes
Turbo actuator stickiness - reduced boost response
entries.cta: Get quotes for BYL Dodge Caliber engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: EGR/DPF-equipped variant introduced for Euro 4 compliance; common on 2009+ models.
commonFailures: DPF clogging - frequent regenerations on urban use
EGR cooler leaks - coolant loss and overheating risk
entries.cta: Get quotes for BSY Dodge Caliber engine replacement

entries.title: 2.2L Diesel
entries.history: Euro 5-compliant upgrade; larger displacement for improved torque and emissions performance.
commonFailures: AdBlue system faults - SCR catalyst warnings
High-pressure fuel pump wear - low power complaints
entries.cta: Get quotes for ENR Dodge Caliber engine replacement

entries.title: 1.8L Petrol
entries.history: Entry-level World Engine; aluminium block with dual VVT but prone to oil consumption issues.
commonFailures: Excessive oil consumption - piston ring design flaw from 60k miles
Timing chain tensioner wear - cold-start rattle precedes failure
Cam sensor failure - intermittent no-start after 80k miles
entries.cta: Get quotes for EBA Dodge Caliber engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: Mid-range World Engine; shared architecture with EBA but increased displacement for more torque.
commonFailures: Timing chain stretch - rattling noise on cold start
VVT solenoid clogging - rough idle and power loss
Oil pump pickup screen clogging - low oil pressure warnings
entries.cta: Get quotes for ECB Dodge Caliber engine replacement

entries.title: 2.4L Petrol
entries.history: Top naturally-aspirated World Engine; used in R/T and Limited for improved performance.
commonFailures: Balance shaft chain wear - secondary rattling noise
Piston ring land cracking - under sustained high load
Thermostat housing leaks - coolant loss and overheating
entries.cta: Get quotes for ED3 Dodge Caliber engine replacement

entries.title: 2.4L Turbo Petrol (SRT4)
entries.history: High-output turbo variant exclusive to SRT4; forged internals and upgraded turbo for 285hp output.
commonFailures: Turbocharger bearing failure - shaft whine above 3,000rpm
Forged piston ring land cracking - extreme tuning risk
Intercooler piping split - boost leaks cause power loss
entries.cta: Get quotes for ECE Dodge Caliber engine replacement

commonProblems.h2: Dodge Caliber Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Dodge Caliber's World Engine petrol units and 2.0 CRD diesels dominate UK replacement enquiries. Oil consumption on 1.8/2.0L petrol and injector/EGR failures on CRD diesels are the most frequent failure patterns. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: Excessive Oil Consumption - Why Dodge Caliber World Engine Petrol Units Fail
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Caliber SE, SXT, SX 1.8L/2.0L Petrol (2006-2012, EBA & ECB engine codes)
problems.rootCause: Piston ring design flaw allows oil to bypass rings and burn in combustion chamber; worsened by infrequent oil changes.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace valve stem seals, PCV valve, use high-viscosity oil
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; may reduce consumption but won't resolve ring design flaw

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Engine strip, replace piston rings, hone bores, new gaskets
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if block is undamaged; labour-intensive, risk of hidden wear

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit with upgraded rings, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most cost-effective long-term solution; eliminates recurrence risk

problems.recommendation: On a Dodge Caliber worth £2,000-£4,000, a full rebuilt engine at £2,400-£3,100 often represents better value than a £1,500+ ring job that may not fully resolve the consumption issue. We recommend comparing rebuilt quotes first.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt EBA/ECB engine prices for your Dodge Caliber

problems.h4: CRD Diesel Injector Failure - Why Dodge Caliber 2.0 CRD Engines Struggle
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Caliber SXT, SE, SX, Crossroad 2.0 CRD (2006-2012, BWD/BYL/BSY engine codes)
problems.rootCause: Piezo injectors sensitive to fuel quality; internal solenoid wear causes poor atomisation, hard starts and misfires.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Ultrasonic clean, flow test, ECU adaptation reset
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable for early-stage clogging; won't fix mechanical wear

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace one faulty injector, code to ECU, road test
repairOptions.longevity: Risk of mismatched flow rates if other injectors are near failure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit with refurbished injectors, bench-tested, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if multiple injectors suspect or high mileage; eliminates cascade failure risk

problems.recommendation: If diagnostic confirms multiple injector faults or mileage exceeds 90k, replacement with a rebuilt BWD/BSY engine is typically more economical than piecemeal injector repairs.
problems.cta: Get quotes for BWD Dodge Caliber diesel engine replacement

problems.h4: Timing Chain Tensioner Wear - Cold-Start Rattle on Dodge Caliber Engines
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Caliber 1.8/2.0L Petrol & 2.0 CRD Diesel (2006-2012, EBA/ECB/BWD codes)
problems.rootCause: Hydraulic tensioner loses pressure over time; chain slack causes rattling on cold start and risks valve timing jump.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tensioner, guides, chain if stretched; timing reset
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if caught early before chain stretch or tooth jump occurs

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt unit with updated tensioner design, bench-tested, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if rattling accompanied by misfires, loss of power, or metal debris in oil

problems.recommendation: If cold-start rattle is the only symptom and mileage is under 90k, a tensioner/guide replacement may suffice. If accompanied by misfires or metal particles, replacement is safer.
problems.cta: Compare timing chain repair vs rebuilt engine costs for your Caliber

problems.h4: EGR Valve & DPF Clogging - Dodge Caliber CRD Emissions System Failures
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Caliber SX, SXT, Crossroad 2.0 CRD with DPF (2009-2012, BSY/ENR codes)
problems.rootCause: Short-journey driving prevents DPF regeneration; EGR carbon buildup restricts airflow, triggering limp mode.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - EGR Clean / DPF Forced Regen
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove/clean EGR valve, force DPF regeneration via diagnostic tool
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; recurrence likely if driving pattern unchanged

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - EGR Delete / DPF Remove (Off-Road Use)
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Blank EGR, remove DPF, remap ECU (note: not MOT-compliant for road use)
repairOptions.longevity: Legal only for off-road/competition; voids MOT compliance

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt Euro 5-compliant unit, warranty, MOT-ready
repairOptions.longevity: Only road-legal solution for high-mileage Calibers needing emissions compliance

problems.recommendation: For road-legal repairs, a rebuilt ENR/BSY engine with fresh emissions components is the only MOT-compliant long-term fix. Off-road deletes carry legal and resale risks.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Euro 5 compliant Dodge Caliber diesel engines

problems.h4: Turbocharger Failure - Boost Loss on High-Mileage Dodge Caliber CRD
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Caliber SXT, Crossroad, Limited 2.0/2.2 CRD (2006-2012, BWD/ENR codes)
problems.rootCause: Turbo bearing wear from oil starvation or carbon buildup; shaft play causes oil leaks and loss of boost pressure.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace bearings, seals, clean housing; reuse core if undamaged
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if housing and turbine wheels are undamaged

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Fit remanufactured turbo unit, new gaskets, oil feed line
repairOptions.longevity: Good option if engine otherwise healthy; ensure oil system is clean first

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with refurbished turbo, bench-tested, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if turbo failure caused oil contamination or metal debris entered engine

problems.recommendation: If turbo failure occurred suddenly with no prior warning signs and oil is clean, a turbo exchange may suffice. If metal debris is present or engine has high mileage, full replacement is safer.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt CRD engine prices with turbo included for your Dodge Caliber

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Dodge Caliber
finalCta.paragraph: The problems above represent the most common failure patterns driving Dodge Caliber engine replacement enquiries across the UK. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Caliber specialists for rebuilt, reconditioned or used engines. Every unit includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, bench testing, and a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. With nationwide supply & fit available, you can get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Dodge Caliber Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Dodge Caliber and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Dodge Caliber Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Dodge Caliber in the UK is listed below, with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the right replacement.

items.title: Dodge Caliber 2.0L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.0L CRD diesel was the backbone of the UK Caliber range from launch, offering strong torque and motorway economy. Fitted to SE, SXT and SX variants, it uses VW-derived EA188 architecture with piezo injectors and turbocharging.
commonFailurePoints: turbo seal leaks at high mileage
items.cta: Get quotes for Dodge Caliber 2.0L diesel engines

items.title: Dodge Caliber 2.2L Diesel Engines
items.description: Introduced in 2010 for Euro 5 compliance, the 2.2L CRD offered increased torque and lower emissions for late-model Limited and Crossroad AWD variants. Requires AdBlue system maintenance.
items.cta: Get quotes for Dodge Caliber 2.2L diesel engines

items.title: Dodge Caliber 1.8L Petrol Engines
items.description: The entry-level World Engine petrol unit, the 1.8L EBA offered adequate performance for urban driving but is known for oil consumption issues due to piston ring design. Common on early SE and SXT models.
items.cta: Compare Dodge Caliber 1.8L petrol engine prices

items.title: Dodge Caliber 2.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The mid-range World Engine petrol, the 2.0L ECB provided better torque for motorway use while sharing architecture with the 1.8L. Timing chain and VVT solenoid issues are the most reported failures.
items.cta: Compare Dodge Caliber 2.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Dodge Caliber 2.4L Petrol Engines
items.description: The largest naturally-aspirated World Engine, the 2.4L ED3 powered R/T and Limited variants for improved performance. Balance shaft chain wear and thermostat housing leaks are noted failure points.
commonFailurePoints: piston ring land cracking under load
items.cta: Compare Dodge Caliber 2.4L petrol engine prices

items.title: Dodge Caliber 2.4L Turbo Engines
items.description: Exclusive to the SRT4 performance variant, the turbocharged 2.4L ECE delivered 285hp with forged internals. Specialist rebuilds are required due to high-stress operation and limited UK availability.
items.cta: Enquire about Dodge Caliber 2.4L turbo engine availability

engineSizes.closing: Not sure which engine size your Dodge Caliber needs? Enter your registration number above - we'll identify the exact displacement, engine code and compatible replacement options instantly. All engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty from UK Dodge Caliber specialists.

DPF clogging on short-journey urban use

ECB/ECN - 2.0L mid-range, timing chain and VVT solenoid issues

foundIn: First Generation PM Platform (2006-2012) - EBA, ECB, ED3, ECE

Oil burning on EBA/ECB due to piston ring design

engineYears.h2: Dodge Caliber Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Dodge Caliber's UK production run (2006-2012), organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.preview: Launch Year: World Engine Petrol & 2.0 CRD Diesel Debut
years.description: The Caliber launched with Chrysler's new World Engine petrol range and VW-sourced 2.0 CRD diesel, establishing the core powertrains for the model's UK life.
keyChanges: UK market launch with SE and SXT trim levels
Introduction of 1.8L (EBA) and 2.0L (ECB) World Engine petrol units
2.0 CRD diesel (BWD code) offered from launch for torque-focused buyers
CVT automatic and 5/6-speed manual transmission options available
knownFor: Strong initial sales driven by competitive pricing
Early reports of oil consumption on 1.8L EBA petrol units
BWD diesel praised for torque but injector concerns emerge post-70k miles
CVT reliability questions begin in owner forums
years.cta: Get quotes for 2006-2007 Dodge Caliber replacement engines
years.ticker: Dodge Caliber 1.8 oil consumption fix • Dodge Caliber BWD injector replacement • Dodge Caliber CVT transmission engine match
enquiries: Dodge Caliber CVT transmission engine match

years.preview: Facelift Year: Sport & R/T Variants Added, Engine Code Expansion
years.description: The 2008 facelift introduced Sport and R/T performance trims, expanding engine options to include the 2.4L ED3 petrol and refined BWD diesel calibration.
keyChanges: Facelift exterior styling and interior trim updates
New Sport and R/T variants with 2.4L ED3 petrol engine
BYL and BSY diesel codes introduced for emissions calibration updates
CVT software updates to address early reliability concerns
knownFor: ED3 2.4L praised for improved performance over 2.0L
Timing chain rattle reports increase on high-mileage World Engine units
BSY code introduces EGR/DPF complexity for Euro 4 compliance
R/T variant gains enthusiast following despite limited UK numbers
years.cta: Get quotes for 2008 Dodge Caliber replacement engines
years.ticker: Dodge Caliber timing chain replacement • Dodge Caliber ED3 balance shaft repair • Dodge Caliber BSY EGR valve clean
enquiries: Dodge Caliber ED3 balance shaft repair
Dodge Caliber BSY EGR valve clean

years.description: Emissions regulations drive introduction of Euro 5-compliant ENR 2.2L diesel and Crossroad AWD variant, while petrol range remains unchanged.
keyChanges: ENR 2.2L CRD diesel introduced for Euro 5 compliance (Limited, Crossroad)
Crossroad AWD variant launched with optional 2.0/2.2 CRD engines
DPF and AdBlue systems become standard on new diesel registrations
Final year for SRT4 turbo imports (ECE engine code)
knownFor: ENR diesel offers improved torque but adds AdBlue maintenance complexity
Crossroad AWD gains niche following for light off-road capability
SRT4 ECE engines command premium rebuild pricing due to rarity
DPF regeneration issues reported on urban-driven diesel Calibers
years.cta: Get quotes for 2009-2010 Dodge Caliber replacement engines
years.ticker: Dodge Caliber ENR AdBlue fault • Dodge Caliber Crossroad AWD engine • Dodge Caliber SRT4 turbo rebuild

years.preview: Final Production Years: Run-Out Models & Parts Availability Focus
years.description: As Caliber production winds down, focus shifts to parts availability and cost-effective replacement solutions for ageing UK fleet.
keyChanges: Final UK registrations of new Caliber units
Increased demand for rebuilt engines as original units reach high mileage
Specialist rebuilders develop upgraded components for known failure points
SXT Plus and Limited trims dominate remaining used market
mainEngines: ECB/ECN - 2.0L petrol with VVT updates (SXT Plus)
knownFor: High-mileage oil consumption issues peak on early World Engine units
Rebuilt engine demand surges as original units exceed 120k miles
ENR 2.2L diesel becomes most sought-after replacement for late-model Calibers
Supply & fit services gain popularity as DIY repairs decline
years.cta: Get quotes for 2011-2012 Dodge Caliber replacement engines

faq.h2: Dodge Caliber Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Dodge Caliber engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: Typical rebuilt Dodge Caliber engine costs range from £2,400 to £3,800 for standard petrol/diesel units, with SRT4 turbo rebuilds from £4,500. Supply & fit labour adds £450-£850 depending on location.
keyPoints: Standard rebuilt engines: £2,400-£3,800 supply only
SRT4 performance rebuilds: £4,500-£5,200 due to specialist components
Labour for supply & fit: typically £450-£850 extra
Prices include 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard
items.cta: Compare live Dodge Caliber engine replacement quotes today

items.question: What engine codes fit my Dodge Caliber?
items.answer: Common Dodge Caliber engine codes include BWD/BYL/BSY (2.0 CRD diesel), EBA/ECB/ED3 (World Engine petrol), ENR (2.2 CRD diesel), and ECE (SRT4 turbo). Always verify via registration lookup.
keyPoints: Diesel: BWD, BYL, BSY (2.0L), ENR (2.2L Euro 5)
Petrol: EBA (1.8L), ECB/ECN (2.0L), ED3 (2.4L), ECE (SRT4 turbo)
Transmission compatibility (CVT/manual) affects fitment
DVLA registration check ensures exact code match
items.cta: Verify your Dodge Caliber engine code instantly with reg lookup

items.question: Is a rebuilt Dodge Caliber engine reliable?
items.answer: Yes, rebuilt Dodge Caliber engines from vetted UK specialists include upgraded components addressing known failure points like oil consumption and timing chain wear, backed by 12-month warranty.
keyPoints: Upgraded piston rings fix World Engine oil consumption issues
Updated tensioners address timing chain failure risks
Bench testing before dispatch ensures quality control
12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard across network
items.cta: Get rebuilt Dodge Caliber engine quotes with warranty included

items.question: How long does Dodge Caliber engine replacement take?
items.answer: Typical Dodge Caliber engine supply & fit takes 2-4 working days from engine arrival at your chosen garage, depending on parts availability and workshop scheduling.
keyPoints: Engine delivery: 1-2 days from order confirmation
Fitment time: 1-2 days at partner garage
Post-fit diagnostics and road test included
Nationwide network minimises transport delays
items.cta: Book Dodge Caliber engine supply & fit with local specialist

items.question: Can I upgrade my Dodge Caliber engine?
items.answer: Engine upgrades on the Dodge Caliber are possible but complex; swapping to a larger displacement or turbo variant requires ECU remapping, transmission compatibility checks and specialist fabrication.
keyPoints: 2.4L ED3 into 2.0L Caliber requires ECU and wiring harness changes
SRT4 turbo conversion is expensive and rarely cost-effective
Transmission compatibility (CVT/manual) is critical
Professional consultation recommended before proceeding
items.cta: Speak to a Dodge Caliber engine specialist about upgrade options

items.question: What causes Dodge Caliber engine failure?
items.answer: Most Dodge Caliber engine failures stem from oil consumption on World Engine petrol units, injector/EGR issues on 2.0 CRD diesels, or timing chain tensioner wear across both fuel types.
keyPoints: Petrol: piston ring design flaw causes oil burning from 60k miles
Diesel: piezo injector wear and EGR clogging trigger limp mode
Both: timing chain tensioner failure causes cold-start rattle
Regular servicing delays but doesn't prevent design-related failures
items.cta: Diagnose your Dodge Caliber engine problem with specialist advice

items.question: Should I repair or replace my Dodge Caliber engine?
items.answer: For Dodge Caliber engines with major internal damage or high mileage, replacement with a rebuilt unit is often more cost-effective than extensive repairs, especially when warranty coverage is factored in.
keyPoints: Minor issues (sensor, gasket) may justify repair
Major failures (pistons, crank, head) favour replacement
Rebuilt engines include warranty; repairs typically do not
Consider vehicle value vs. repair cost before deciding
items.cta: Compare repair vs replacement costs for your Dodge Caliber
